case_title: TIMOTHY CAMERON VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-24-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMERON, TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK MARTINEZ, DAVID ACM FINANCIAL ADVANTAGE TRUSTEE ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE THERETO DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-10-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-10-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-29-2010

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-10-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST L. P. RYAN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-19-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-03-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR TRO AND OSC RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMERON, TIMOTHY
